title: Infinite Firework
description: Used for Elytra flight. Provides a player with a firework if they have none in their inventory (if they have a nether star)
body:
An updated version of [https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/nfinite-fireworks/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/nfinite-fireworks/)

If you have a nether star in your inventory you will given a firework in the first available slot in your inventory. It stops giving you fireworks if you already have one so your inventory doesn't get flooded, but since it constantly gives fireworks you can hold right click to keep boosting with an elytra

Changes from the [original](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/nfinite-fireworks/):
  Nether star requirement (can be easily removed by modifying the pack, the source code is one line)
  Multiplayer support
